title: SBC%20Testimonial
content:
SBC TANZANIA LIMITED 
REF:NO:SBC /SG/05/09/lk 19th May, 2009 
To whom it may concern: 
RE: IMPLEMENTA TION OF MICROSOFT DYNAMICS (NAy)2009 
MIS Techno Brain was hired by SBC Ltd to customize and install the Microsoft Dynamic s 
(NA V) way back in November , 2008. 
The follO\~ing specific roles were define for SBC as follows: 
I. Carrying out a detailed study and analysis of the requirem ent for each of the departments 
at SBC for the first phase. 
2. Product Customization to meet the requirement of SBC. 
3. Key and End user training. 
The modules which are agreed to be installed are as follows: 
1 . Financial Management. 
2. Sales & Marketing. 
3. Purchase. 
4. Ware housing. 
5. Production. 
6. HR. 
The above modules are all launched from Olst of April, 2009 and the system has gone live since 
that date. 
Up till now we find the consultants from Nf/S Techno Brain Ltd is working sincerely, diligently 
and have shown high level of commitment. 
We wish them best of luck in their future endeavor. 
Subhrajyoti Gbosh:r 
PROJECT MANAGER
